trades.reasoning: AAOI has surged to $221.51 vs avg cost $188.24, a +17.7% gain that exceeds the +12% profit target — locking in gains while RSI 76.6 signals overbought conditions.
Score 95 with RSI 67.2 in the clean bullish momentum zone — semiconductor play with MACD crossover and price well above SMA-20, ideal for a risk-on NASDAQ-led day.
Score 90 AI-chip leader with RSI 67.7 and MACD crossover confirmed — NASDAQ +1.1% risk-on tape directly benefits AI infrastructure names.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on with NASDAQ up 1.1%, favoring growth and tech names. AAOI has run past its +12% profit target at nearly +18% — selling the full position to lock in gains and redeploy capital into fresher momentum setups. Deploying proceeds into SYNA and NVDA, both score-95/90 names with clean RSI and MACD confirmation that align with today's bullish tape.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities rallied broadly on May 13, with the NASDAQ outperforming at +1.1% as technology and semiconductor stocks led the advance amid renewed investor appetite for growth assets. Risk sentiment improved following easing trade tensions and positive macro data, drawing capital back into high-beta names that had pulled back in recent weeks. The S&P 500 added a more modest +0.6%, reflecting selective strength concentrated in tech rather than broad sector rotation.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股5月13日普遍上漲，那斯達克指數以+1.1%領先大盤，科技及半導體類股引領升勢，顯示投資者重拾對成長股的偏好。市場情緒因貿易緊張局勢緩和及正面宏觀數據而改善，資金流回近期回調的高貝塔值個股。標普500指數則相對溫和上漲0.6%，反映漲勢集中於科技板塊，而非全面的板塊輪動。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A profit target is a predetermined price level at which you sell a position to lock in gains. Rather than hoping a stock keeps climbing, setting a target (like +12%) forces disciplined selling before greed takes over — protecting realized gains if the stock reverses. AAOI's +17.7% gain is a textbook case: riding momentum is good, but exiting at a profit target prevents giving back your gains.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「獲利目標」是預先設定的賣出價位，用於鎖定已累積的收益。與其期望股價持續上漲，設定目標（例如+12%）能強制執行紀律性賣出，在貪念主導前保住利潤——萬一股價反轉也能守住已實現的獲益。AAOI此次+17.7%的漲幅正是典型案例：追趨勢固然可行，但在獲利目標出場才能確保不把利潤還給市場。
